subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaiden of God! Thy letter was received and its contents were most pleasing, for they testified to the dawning of the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه تو رسید بسیار خوش مضمون بود زیرا دلیل بر اشراق نور هدی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
